ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* The specific model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "color" TEXT /* The color of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* The Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* The date the vehicle was produced */,
  "modification" TEXT /* Modification name for the vehicle */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "engine_capacity" TEXT /* Engine capacity of the vehicle */,
  "max_seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum seating capacity of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" INTEGER /* Transmission type of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_modification FOREIGN KEY ("modification") REFERENCES modifications ("modification_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "modification_name" TEXT /* Name of the modification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the modification entails */,
  "cost" REAL /* The cost of the modification */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* The date when the modification was made */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* The type of modification (e.g., performance, aesthetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specifications" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "engine_capacity" TEXT /* Engine capacity of the vehicle */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* The type of fuel the engine uses */,
  "num_cylinders" INTEGER /* The number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "engine_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the engine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_specifications_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "num_gears" INTEGER /* The number of gears in the transmission */,
  "transmission_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seating_capacities" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seating capacity record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "max_seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum seating capacity of the vehicle */,
  "num_rows" INTEGER /* The number of rows of seats */,
  "seat_material" TEXT /* The material of the seats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seating_capacities_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sold vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* The invoice number for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Sales, Admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
